Metadata.title: Clément Chardine
Metadata.description: Software engineer and tech lead based in Paris. Currently leading development at Eledone, former CTO at Sniive. CentraleSupélec alumnus.

About.code: I've been writing code since I was a teenager, and never really stopped. Right now I lead tech at <eledonelink>Eledone</eledonelink>, where we automate B2B sales administration with AI. Before that I co-founded <sniivelink>Sniive</sniivelink> as CTO, building a SaaS platform for process documentation in Rust, incubated at Station F. I've also built Chrome extensions and developer APIs at <cedelink>CEDE Labs</cedelink>, and diagnostic tooling for medical exoskeletons at <wanderlink>Wandercraft</wanderlink>.
About.other: When I'm not coding, I make <spotilink>music</spotilink>, curate playlists, and keep exploring whatever catches my attention next.

Identity.title: Software Engineer
Identity.subtitle: I make apps, tools and websites, currently leading tech at Eledone and working with AI on a daily basis.

Lab.title: Lab
Lab.description: A collection of interesting things I've found and experiments I've run

eledone.name: Tech Lead
eledone.children: Leading technical development at Eledone, an AI-powered startup automating B2B sales administration through intelligent processing of quotes and orders. Building a robust platform that connects with major ERP systems and leverages advanced AI models for document processing.<h>Tech highlights:</h><u><l>Backend development with Python and Django for core AI processing pipelines</l><l>Frontend development with Next.js and TypeScript for intuitive user interfaces</l><l>Cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)</l><l>Integration with multiple ERP systems and email processing automation</l><l>AI/ML model optimization for document extraction and data matching</l></u><h>Business highlights:</h><u><l>Supported by CentraleSupélec, HEC Paris, Station F, and Wilco</l><l>Serving dozens of B2B clients with automated order and quote processing</l><l>Plug & play solution compatible with all major ERP systems</l></u>

sniive.name: Cofounder & CTO
sniive.children: Experience in entrepreneurship, focused on creating a SaaS platform for rapid business process documentation. Led the product development from the ground up, covering all aspects including frontend, backend, and cloud services.<h>Tech highlights:</h><u><l>Extensive use of GenAI (multimodal LLMs) and AI Vision technologies</l><l>Full-stack development for a web application hosted on Vercel</l><l>Cloud infrastructure management on Azure, emphasizing serverless architecture and microservices</l><l>Cross-platform desktop application development using Rust and Tauri</l></u><h>Business highlights:</h><u><l>B2B-focused, with +2K$ secured in pre-sales</l><l>Iterative development approach with a focus on customer feedback</l><l>Incubated at STATION F, the world's largest startup campus</l><l>Backed by CentraleSupélec and top French entrepreneurs</l></u>

cede.name: Fullstack Developer
cede.children: Worked on the development of a SaaS platform and a Chrome extension for the management of digital assets, both on centralized and decentralized networks.<h>Main responsibilities:</h><u><l>In-depth refactoring of the business logic of the extension for better performance and optimized developer experience</l><l>Building an API for the platform, now packaged as an SDK for third-party developers</l><l>R&D project on a native mobile application for the platform</l></u>

wandercraft.name: Software Developer
wandercraft.children: Developed a tool to monitor and diagnose issues with the exoskeleton. The application was used by maintenance teams and engineers, for both remote and on-site support.<s></s>The tool leveraged the EtherCAT protocol to communicate with the exoskeleton, and was focused on gaining insights from a complex and possibly faulty system.

centralesupelec.name: Master's Degree in Engineering
centralesupelec.children: Graduated with a specialization in Software Architecture and Engineering at CentraleSupélec (top 2 French engineering school).<s></s>Additional cursus in Entrepreneurship during the last year.<h>Main courses:</h><u><l>Software Engineering and Algorithms</l><l>System and Network Infrastructures</l><l>Applicative Architectures</l><l>Economics and Management of IT</l><l>Strategic Transformation of IT</l></u><h>Other courses:</h><u><l>Design</l><l>Economics</l><l>Data Engineering</l><l>Maths and Statistics</l><l>Electronics and Physics</l></u>

kaist.name: Semester Abroad
kaist.children: A semester abroad at 한국과학기술원 🇰🇷 (top 1 South Korean university) in the Department of Mechanical Engineering.<h>Courses:</h><u><l>Machine Learning for Robotics</l><l>Coding Theory</l><l>Robot Dynamics</l><l>Lean Startup Methodology</l></u>

sorbonne.name: Bachelor's Degree in Philosophy
sorbonne.children: Followed L3 philosophy courses at the Sorbonne University (Paris IV) during the first year of my engineering studies.<h>Topics:</h><u><l>Logic</l><l>Ethics</l><l>Political Philosophy</l><l>Metaphysics</l><l>Philosophy of Language</l><l>Indian Philosophy</l></u>

prepa.name: Preparatory Classes
prepa.children: Preparatory classes in Mathematics, Physics and Engineering Sciences (MPSI/MP*) at Lycée Pierre Corneille in Rouen
